title: RefinementPreflightResultV1
description: Output schema for run_refinement_preflight.py result artifact. Strict: additionalProperties false.

status.description: Wrapper-level status after applying exit_code_mapping table.

planner_exit_code.description: Exit code returned by plan_refinement_loop.py. Null if planner was not invoked.

planner_fail_closed.description: Value of plan.fail_closed.required from planner output. Null if planner was not invoked.

next_action.description: Suggested next action for the orchestrator (e.g. 'proceed', 'human_judgment_required', 'fix_environment').

must_read.description: Files/paths the orchestrator must read before proceeding.

do_not_read.description: Files/paths the orchestrator must not read to conserve context.

commands.description: Suggested commands. Each item must use argv array only (no shell strings).

argv.description: Argument vector. Must not contain shell-interpolated strings.

shell.description: Always false. Shell execution is prohibited.

artifacts.description: Paths to artifact files written by this wrapper.

hashes.description: SHA256 hashes of key artifacts for byte-stability verification.
